info.title: GitHub issue tools
info.description: Retrieves a single GitHub issue and its comments by issue number.

get.description: Get a single issue by number, including its full body, state, labels, and metadata

parameters.name: owner
parameters.description: The account owner of the repository (e.g. IT-EXPERTS-AT)

parameters.name: repo
parameters.description: The name of the repository (e.g. tagger)

parameters.name: issue_number
parameters.description: The number that identifies the issue

get.description: List all comments on a single issue, including each comment's author and body text

parameters.name: owner
parameters.description: The account owner of the repository (e.g. IT-EXPERTS-AT)

parameters.name: repo
parameters.description: The name of the repository (e.g. tagger)

parameters.name: issue_number
parameters.description: The number that identifies the issue

200.description: The list of comments on the issue
